title: Western Blot
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8ha87","text":"This is a protocol of Leo Parra-Rivas, PhD.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dilute protein samples to 1.25 µg/µL . For running a 10-well gel, each loading sample should be around 15 µL to 20 µL .

Assemble the module according to instructions (membrane = 0.2ul pores; gel needs to be flipped). Ensure all bubbles are removed. Add transfer buffer (ice cold) to the tank. Securely locate the module. Add ice around the tank before running. Run at 25-30V for 01:25:00
Fixation: rinse membrane with 1xPBS. Incubate in 0.4% PFA for 00:30:00 .
Add 4x sample buffer to protein samples.

Secure the gel (NuPAGE 4-12% Bis-Tris Gel; 1.5mm 10 wells) into the module. Fill the tank with running buffer. Load 15 µL of the ladder, and 20 µL of the samples (25ug/20ul, more if less concentrated). Run at 70-80V for 01:15:00 . Until the blue band reaches the end of the gel, run for 10 more min.
Ensure the strip on the bottom is removed. Remove the comb without breaking the wells.
You may add more buffer if the buffer level is low. You may increase the voltage to 100V.
Blocking: wash with 1xPBS, 3 times 00:10:00 . Block with 5-10% milk for 01:00:00 .

Primary antibody: Specific primary antibody diluted in 5% nonfat dried milk in TBST, 4 °C overnight with rocker. Wash: Recover the primary antibody, and rinse with wash buffer. Wash for 00:30:00 with wash buffer

Secondary antibody: Secondary antibody 1:2000 in milk, 01:00:00 Room temperature . Add approximately 10 ml to each tray. Wash: Rinse and wash with wash buffer. The membrane can be stored in the wash buffer

Mix imaging reagent 1:1. Either apply reagent to membrane before imaging, or incubate the membrane in mixed reagent for 00:05:00 while rocking. Avoid bubbles when placing the membrane on the machine. Single image, start with 0.1s exposure and gradually increase until desired exposure is achieved. More reagent can be added if signal is reduced.
transfer buffer: 1500ml H2O, 400ml methanol, 100ml transfer buffer 20X
creator: Yiqin Shen
